response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics matched the context of Hololive English's 'Justice' unit. The reference lyrics fields were empty, requiring 100% manual transcription of the spoken dialogue. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was utilized for identifying the characters and context, while the dialogue was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all spoken lines tightly to the characters' voice bursts, handling overlaps and rapid conversational speech gracefully. The silent outro slide was subtitled as a visual event.

subtitles.original: Hello! Thank you very much, everyone, for being...

subtitles.original: ...the stage is very cool! Look at the stage! Woah!
subtitles.english: ...the stage is very cool! Look at the stage! Woah!

subtitles.original: And look at this amazing team. I couldn't ask for better.

subtitles.english: And Justiciar, we love you all very much, too.

subtitles.original: Thanks Justiciar, thank you for supporting us for... two... years?
subtitles.english: Thanks Justiciar, thank you for supporting us for... two... years?

subtitles.english: Two! We didn't even know we could...

subtitles.english: I didn't even know Raora could count to two!
